title: Zillow Group Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Financial Results
text: Zillow 2021 Full-Year and Q4 Earnings Results. 2021 Financial Performance: Full-year 2021 revenue results were driven primarily by the IMT segment, which saw Adjusted EBITDA margin expanding to 45% from 38% in 2020. Traffic Metrics: Q4 2021 traffic to Zillow Group's mobile apps and websites reached 198 million average monthly unique users, driving 2.3 billion visits during the quarter (up 2% year over year). Full year 2021 visits totaled 10.2 billion, up 6% from the previous year. Q1 2021 Results: Traffic to Zillow Group's mobile apps and websites in the first quarter of 2021 reached 221 million average monthly unique users, an increase of 15% year over year, driving 2.5 billion visits during the quarter, up 19% year over year. Market Context: 2021 was marked by strong housing market activity driven by historically low mortgage rates and pandemic-related remote work trends. The company benefited from high transaction volumes, particularly in its Premier Agent and IMT segments, though subsequently faced challenges from the attempted expansion into iBuying.
